my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: Finished and tested TTL implementation. Summary of what I touched: (1) cache.py: import TTLCache alongside LRUCache; Cache.__init__ gained a trailing 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' param (after memory_max_entries) and self.ttl attribute; memory_cache construction now branches TTLCache vs LRUCache based on ttl; get() calls self.disk_cache.expire() on miss when ttl is set; put() uses self.disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl) when ttl is set else plain assignment. (2) __init__.py: import LRUCache/TTLCache; configure_cache() gained trailing 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' param, passed as ttl=ttl into Cache(...); DSPY_CACHE construction now passes ttl=None; added set_ttl(seconds) function; added 'set_ttl' to __all__ (only appended, did not reorder/remove existing entries).
